verses.douay_rheims: The burden that Habakkuk the prophet saw.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tämä on se raskaus, jonka propheta Habakuk on nähnyt.
verses.king_james: The burden which Habakkuk the prophet did see.

verses.latin_vulgate: Usquequo, Domine, clamabo,  et non exaudies ?  vociferabor ad te, vim patiens,  et non salvabis ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַד־אָ֧נָה יְהֹוָ֛ה שִׁוַּ֖עְתִּי וְלֹ֣א תִשְׁמָ֑ע אֶזְעַ֥ק אֵלֶ֛יךָ חָמָ֖ס וְלֹ֥א תוֹשִֽׁיעַ׃
verses.douay_rheims: How long, O Lord, shall I cry, and thou wilt not hear? shall I cry out to thee suffering violence, and thou wilt not save?
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra, kuinka kauvan minun pitää huutaman, ja et sinä tahdo kuulla? kuinka kauvan minun pitää parkuman väkivallan tähden, ja et sinä tahdo auttaa?
verses.king_james: O Lord, how long shall I cry, and thou wilt not hear! even cry out unto thee of violence, and thou wilt not save!

verses.latin_vulgate: Quare ostendisti mihi iniquitatem et laborem,  videre prædam et injustitiam contra me ?  Et factum est judicium, et contradictio potentior.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָ֣מָּה תַרְאֵ֤נִי אָ֙וֶן֙ וְעָמָ֣ל תַּבִּ֔יט וְשֹׁ֥ד וְחָמָ֖ס לְנֶגְדִּ֑י וַיְהִ֧י רִ֦יב וּמָד֖וֹן יִשָּֽׂא׃
verses.douay_rheims: Why hast thou shewn me iniquity and grievance, to see rapine and injustice before me? and there is a judgment, but opposition is more powerful.
verses.finnish_biblia: Miksis minulle vaivaa ja työtä osoitat? miksis minun annat nähdä ryövyyttä ja väkivaltaa minun ympärilläni? riita ja tora saa vallan.
verses.king_james: Why dost thou shew me iniquity, and cause me to behold grievance? for spoiling and violence are before me: and there are that raise up strife and contention.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propter hoc lacerata est lex,  et non pervenit usque ad finem judicium ;  quia impius prævalet adversus justum,  propterea egreditur judicium perversum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַל־כֵּן֙ תָּפ֣וּג תּוֹרָ֔ה וְלֹא־יֵצֵ֥א לָנֶ֖צַח מִשְׁפָּ֑ט כִּ֤י רָשָׁע֙ מַכְתִּ֣יר אֶת־הַצַּדִּ֔יק עַל־כֵּ֛ן יֵצֵ֥א מִשְׁפָּ֖ט מְעֻקָּֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Therefore the law is torn in pieces, and judgment cometh not to the end: because the wicked prevaileth against the just, therefore wrong judgment goeth forth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden hyljätään laki, ja oikeus ei koskaan saa edes käydä; sillä jumalatoin sortaa vanhurskasta, sentähden tehdään väärät tuomiot.
verses.king_james: Therefore the law is slacked, and judgment doth never go forth: for the wicked doth compass about the righteous; therefore wrong judgment proceedeth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Aspicite in gentibus, et videte ;  admiramini, et obstupescite :  quia opus factum est in diebus vestris,  quod nemo credet cum narrabitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רְא֤וּ בַגּוֹיִם֙ וְֽהַבִּ֔יטוּ וְהִֽתַּמְּה֖וּ תְּמָ֑הוּ כִּי־פֹ֙עַל֙ פֹּעֵ֣ל בִּימֵיכֶ֔ם לֹ֥א תַאֲמִ֖ינוּ כִּ֥י יְסֻפָּֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Behold ye among the nations, and see: wonder, and be astonished: for a work is done in your days, which no man will believe when it shall be told.
verses.finnish_biblia: Katsokaat pakanain seassa, katsokaat ja ihmetelkäät, ja hämmästykäät; sillä minä teen työn teidän aikananne, jota ei teidän pidä uskoman, kuin siitä puhutaan.
verses.king_james: Behold ye among the heathen, and regard, and wonder marvellously: for I will work a work in your days, which ye will not believe, though it be told you.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia ecce ego suscitabo Chaldæos,  gentem amaram et velocem,  ambulantem super latitudinem terræ,  ut possideat tabernacula non sua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־הִנְנִ֤י מֵקִים֙ אֶת־הַכַּשְׂדִּ֔ים הַגּ֖וֹי הַמַּ֣ר וְהַנִּמְהָ֑ר הַהוֹלֵךְ֙ לְמֶרְחֲבֵי־אֶ֔רֶץ לָרֶ֖שֶׁת מִשְׁכָּנ֥וֹת לֹּא־לֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For behold, I will raise up the Chaldeans, a bitter and swift nation, marching upon the breadth of the earth, to possess the dwelling places that are not their own.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä katso, minä herätän Kaldealaiset, haikian ja nopian kansan, jonka pitä vaeltaman niin leviältä kuin maa on, ja omistaman ne asumiset, jotka ei heidän omansa ole;
verses.king_james: For, lo, I raise up the Chaldeans, that bitter and hasty nation, which shall march through the breadth of the land, to possess the dwellingplaces that are not theirs.

verses.latin_vulgate: Horribilis et terribilis est :  ex semetipsa judicium et onus ejus egredietur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָיֹ֥ם וְנוֹרָ֖א ה֑וּא מִמֶּ֕נּוּ מִשְׁפָּט֥וֹ וּשְׂאֵת֖וֹ יֵצֵֽא׃
verses.douay_rheims: They are dreadful, and terrible: from themselves shall their judgment, and their burden proceed.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka pitää hirmuinen ja julma oleman, käskemän ja vaatiman, niinkuin hän tahtoo.
verses.king_james: They are terrible and dreadful: their judgment and their dignity shall proceed of themselves.

verses.latin_vulgate: Leviores pardis equi ejus,  et velociores lupis vespertinis :  et diffundentur equites ejus :  equites namque ejus de longe venient ;  volabunt quasi aquila festinans ad comedendum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְקַלּ֨וּ מִנְּמֵרִ֜ים סוּסָ֗יו וְחַדּוּ֙ מִזְּאֵ֣בֵי עֶ֔רֶב וּפָ֖שׁוּ פָּרָשָׁ֑יו וּפָֽרָשָׁיו֙ מֵרָח֣וֹק יָבֹ֔אוּ יָעֻ֕פוּ כְּנֶ֖שֶׁר חָ֥שׁ לֶאֱכֽוֹל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Their horses are lighter than leopards, and swifter than evening wolves; and their horsemen shall be spread abroad: for their horsemen shall come from afar, they shall fly as an eagle that maketh haste to eat.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hänen hevosensa ovat nopiammat kuin pardit, ja purevaisemmat kuin sudet ehtoolla; hänen ratsasmiehensä vaeltavat lavialta; ja hänen ratsasmiehensä tulevat kaukaa, ja lentävät, niinkuin kotka rientää raadolle.
verses.king_james: Their horses also are swifter than the leopards, and are more fierce than the evening wolves: and their horsemen shall spread themselves, and their horsemen shall come from far; they shall fly as the eagle that hasteth to eat.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnes ad prædam venient,  facies eorum ventus urens ;  et congregabit quasi arenam captivitatem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֻּלֹּה֙ לְחָמָ֣ס יָב֔וֹא מְגַמַּ֥ת פְּנֵיהֶ֖ם קָדִ֑ימָה וַיֶּאֱסֹ֥ף כַּח֖וֹל שֶֽׁבִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: They shall all come to the prey, their face is like a burning wind: and they shall gather together captives as the sand.
verses.finnish_biblia: He tulevat kaikki vahingoittamaan; he kääntävät kasvonsa itään päin, ja kokoovat vankeja niinkuin santaa.
verses.king_james: They shall come all for violence: their faces shall sup up as the east wind, and they shall gather the captivity as the sand.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ipse de regibus triumphabit,  et tyranni ridiculi ejus erunt ;  ipse super omnem munitionem ridebit,  et comportabit aggerem, et capiet eam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהוּא֙ בַּמְּלָכִ֣ים יִתְקַלָּ֔ס וְרֹזְנִ֖ים מִשְׂחָ֣ק ל֑וֹ ה֚וּא לְכׇל־מִבְצָ֣ר יִשְׂחָ֔ק וַיִּצְבֹּ֥ר עָפָ֖ר וַֽיִּלְכְּדָֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And their prince shall triumph over kings, and princes shall be his laughingstock: and he shall laugh at every strong hold, and shall cast up a mount, and shall take it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Heidän pitää kuninkaita pilkkaaman ja päämiehiä nauraman; kaikki linnat pitää heidän leikkinänsä oleman; sillä he tekevät vähät vallit, ja voittavat ne.
verses.king_james: And they shall scoff at the kings, and the princes shall be a scorn unto them: they shall deride every strong hold; for they shall heap dust, and take it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tunc mutabitur spiritus, et pertransibit, et corruet :  hæc est fortitudo ejus dei sui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָ֣ז חָלַ֥ף ר֛וּחַ וַֽיַּעֲבֹ֖ר וְאָשֵׁ֑ם ז֥וּ כֹח֖וֹ לֵאלֹהֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then shall his spirit be changed, and he shall pass, and fall: this is his strength of his god.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin he muuttavat mielensä, ylitsekäyvät ja rikkovat, että he kerskaavat voimansa olevan jumalansa.
verses.king_james: Then shall his mind change, and he shall pass over, and offend, imputing this his power unto his god.

verses.latin_vulgate: Numquid non tu a principio,  Domine, Deus meus, sancte meus,  et non moriemur ?  Domine, in judicium posuisti eum,  et fortem, ut corriperes, fundasti eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֲל֧וֹא אַתָּ֣ה מִקֶּ֗דֶם יְהֹוָ֧ה אֱלֹהַ֛י קְדֹשִׁ֖י לֹ֣א נָמ֑וּת יְהֹוָה֙ לְמִשְׁפָּ֣ט שַׂמְתּ֔וֹ וְצ֖וּר לְהוֹכִ֥יחַ יְסַדְתּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Wast thou not from the beginning, O Lord my God, my holy one, and we shall not die? Lord, thou hast appointed him for judgment: and made him strong for correction.
verses.finnish_biblia: Etkös sinä, Herra, ole alusta, minun Jumalani, minun pyhäni. Älä anna meidän kuolla, vaan anna heidän olla, o Herra, meille ainoasti rangaistukseksi, ja anna heidän, o meidän turvamme, meitä ainoasti kurittaa.
verses.king_james: Art thou not from everlasting, O Lord my God, mine Holy One? we shall not die. O Lord, thou hast ordained them for judgment; and, O mighty God, thou hast established them for correction.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mundi sunt oculi tui, ne videas malum,  et respicere ad iniquitatem non poteris.  Quare respicis super iniqua agentes,  et taces devorante impio justiorem se ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: טְה֤וֹר עֵינַ֙יִם֙ מֵרְא֣וֹת רָ֔ע וְהַבִּ֥יט אֶל־עָמָ֖ל לֹ֣א תוּכָ֑ל לָ֤מָּה תַבִּיט֙ בּֽוֹגְדִ֔ים תַּחֲרִ֕ישׁ בְּבַלַּ֥ע רָשָׁ֖ע צַדִּ֥יק מִמֶּֽנּוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thy eyes are too pure to behold evil, and thou canst not look on iniquity. Why lookest thou upon them that do unjust things, and holdest thy peace when the wicked devoureth the man that is more just than himself?
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinun silmäs ovat puhtaat, niin ettes voi pahaa nähdä, ja et tahdo katsoa surkeutta; miksis katsot siis ylönkatsojia, ja vaikenet, kuin jumalatoin nielee sen, joka häntä hurskaampi on?
verses.king_james: Thou art of purer eyes than to behold evil, and canst not look on iniquity: wherefore lookest thou upon them that deal treacherously, and holdest thy tongue when the wicked devoureth the man that is more righteous than he?

verses.latin_vulgate: Et facies homines quasi pisces maris,  et quasi reptile non habens principem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתַּעֲשֶׂ֥ה אָדָ֖ם כִּדְגֵ֣י הַיָּ֑ם כְּרֶ֖מֶשׂ לֹא־מֹשֵׁ֥ל בּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And thou wilt make men as the fishes of the sea, and as the creeping things that have no ruler.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja miksis teet ihmisen niinkuin kalat meressä, niinkuin madot, joilla ei haltiaa ole?
verses.king_james: And makest men as the fishes of the sea, as the creeping things, that have no ruler over them?

verses.latin_vulgate: Totum in hamo sublevavit,  traxit illud in sagena sua,  et congregavit in rete suum.  Super hoc lætabitur, et exsultabit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֻּלֹּה֙ בְּחַכָּ֣ה הֵֽעֲלָ֔ה יְגֹרֵ֣הוּ בְחֶרְמ֔וֹ וְיַאַסְפֵ֖הוּ בְּמִכְמַרְתּ֑וֹ עַל־כֵּ֖ן יִשְׂמַ֥ח וְיָגִֽיל׃
verses.douay_rheims: He lifted up all them with his hook, he drew them in his drag, and gathered them into his net: for this he will be glad and rejoice.
verses.finnish_biblia: He onkivat kaikki ongella, ja vetävät nuotallansa ja saavat verkoillansa; josta he iloitsevat ja riemuitsevat.
verses.king_james: They take up all of them with the angle, they catch them in their net, and gather them in their drag: therefore they rejoice and are glad.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propterea immolabit sagenæ suæ,  et sacrificabit reti suo,  quia in ipsis incrassata est pars ejus,  et cibus ejus electus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַל־כֵּן֙ יְזַבֵּ֣חַ לְחֶרְמ֔וֹ וִֽיקַטֵּ֖ר לְמִכְמַרְתּ֑וֹ כִּ֤י בָהֵ֙מָּה֙ שָׁמֵ֣ן חֶלְק֔וֹ וּמַאֲכָל֖וֹ בְּרִאָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Therefore will he offer victims to his drag, and he will sacrifice to his net: because through them his portion is made fat, and his meat dainty.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden he uhraavat nuotillensa ja suitsuttavat verkoillensa; että heidän osansa niiden kautta lihavaksi tullut on, ja ruokansa herkulliseksi.
verses.king_james: Therefore they sacrifice unto their net, and burn incense unto their drag; because by them their portion is fat, and their meat plenteous.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propter hoc ergo expandit sagenam suam,  et semper interficere gentes non parcet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַ֥עַל כֵּ֖ן יָרִ֣יק חֶרְמ֑וֹ וְתָמִ֛יד לַהֲרֹ֥ג גּוֹיִ֖ם לֹ֥א יַחְמֽוֹל׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: For this cause therefore he spreadeth his net, and will not spare continually to slay the nations.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden he vielä alati heittävät nuottansa ulos, eikä lakkaa kansaa tappamasta.
verses.king_james: Shall they therefore empty their net, and not spare continually to slay the nations?
